CoSparTA 0.1.0

Empirical Bayes Point-Gamma with Posterior Variance and PIP

ebpm_point_gamma_with_uq.Rd

A wrapper around ebpm_point_gamma that extends the posterior output with posterior variance and posterior inclusion probabilities (PIPs). All optimization is delegated to the original function; only the posterior summary is augmented.

Usage

ebpm_point_gamma_with_uq(x, s = 1, ...)

Arguments

x

Non-negative integer vector of observed counts.

s

Numeric scalar or vector of length length(x) giving per-observation exposure/scaling factors. Default 1.

...

Additional arguments passed to ebpm_point_gamma (e.g. g_init, fix_g, pi0, control).

Value

Same structure as ebpm_point_gamma but with four additional columns in posterior:

var

Posterior variance \(\text{Var}(\theta_i \mid x_i)\), decomposed as within-component variance plus between-component variance from spike uncertainty.

pip

Posterior inclusion probability \(P(\theta_i \neq 0 \mid x_i) = 1 - \hat{\pi}_i\).

shape_post

Posterior gamma shape parameter \(a + x_i\).

rate_post

Posterior gamma rate parameter \(b + s_i\).

See also

ebpm_point_gamma, ebpm_point_gamma_multiplier_covariates

On this page
